lessons.title: Boiling Water
lessons.description: Learn how to boil water safely and effectively.
steps: Place the pot on the stove.
Turn on the heat to high.
Wait for the water to reach a rolling boil.
Turn off the heat and use the boiled water as needed.
safety_tips: Always use pot holders when handling hot pots.

lessons.title: Basic Knife Skills
lessons.description: Learn how to safely handle and use a knife in the kitchen.
steps: Hold the knife correctly with a firm grip.
Practice slicing soft vegetables like cucumbers or tomatoes.
Always cut away from your body and keep fingers tucked in.
safety_tips: Always use a sharp knife; dull knives are more dangerous.
Keep your fingers away from the blade while cutting.
